routes.title: Wallet Safety | BlackPebble
routes.description: Know what is simulated, what is read-only, and what requires your signature. Paper trading uses simulated funds, wallet analysis is read-only, and wallet utilities are user-signed. No custody, no seed phrases, no private keys.
